event.body: Hey, can you try once? It will take a maximum of 2-3 minutes and the first 5 prompts are free.

message.body: Hey, can you try once? It will take a maximum of 2-3 minutes and the first 5 prompts are free.

event.message:
Hey Ian, you need to normalize first names before sending. Makes you look bad 😅

Good luck on future endeavors!

flow_message_templates.message:
Hey ,

Thanks for connecting.

Quick question (not a pitch): I run HubCredo, and we build workflow automations using tools like Clay, N8n, etc. 

I wanted to reach out to understand whether successful agencies like yours ever consider outsourcing parts of execution so they can focus more on scaling than day-to-day operations.

Would you be open to a short 15-min chat to share how you think about this? Promise to keep it strictly conversational.

Thanks,
Ian

Hi ,

Just following up in case my earlier message was missed.

To be honest, getting fairly priced projects can be challenging.   

Our strength, however, is execution; we have a strong operations setup and a capable team of GTM engineers.

I wanted to understand whether agencies like yours ever consider outsourcing execution through a white-label model, so you can focus more on scaling.

I’m just gathering feedback at this stage on what works and what doesn’t.

Best,
Ian.
